why_this_action.summary: Repaired directory follow-through selection so matured review-window submissions and current secondary-surface correction packets can become truthful do-now assets without waiting for another synthetic submission burst.

reddit_execution_status_latest.json: Reddit remains execution-blocked from this environment, so non-Reddit follow-through matters more.
